name: live freshness gate blocks a standards-citing operation when the source is older than the freshness window
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch && printf '2026-04-01T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/standards/last-fetch/owasp-asvs.txt && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/freshness-gate.sh" --operation cite-standard --source owasp-asvs --now 2026-05-13T00:00:00Z --freshness-window 24h 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'gate=block' err.txt && grep -q 'reason=stale' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
